title: Trump says Iran has agreed to no nuclear weapons
summary_full: Iran has said it requires the release of $12 billion in frozen assets before it moved to substantive talks on issues such as its nuclear program
summary_public: Iran has said it requires the release of $12 billion in frozen assets before it moved to substantive talks on issues such as its nuclear program

IR.label: mixed
IR.evidence: Iran has agreed to no nuclear weapons Iran has said it requires the release of $12 billion
